body_txt: Pincers and clamps as weapons. A common element for Giant Enemy Crabs and Scary Scorpions , as well as certain Big Creepy-Crawlies . The pincers may be part of the creature's body, or some Artificial Limbs (compare Power Fist ). See also Robotic Pincer Hands . Compare Shear Menace , where a character carries scissors as weapons. Can potentially become Cumbersome Claws .
